calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eli Coffino-Greenberg for Katherine Neilan.

Mr. Coffino-Greenberg presented presented further oral argument to support his position with regard to transfer of the assets to the Trust. The Court denied the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eli Coffino-Greenberg for Katherine Neilan.

The Court stated that there are 23 accounts in Aidan's name alone that they are asking to be put in the Trust and that it does not think it falls under Heggstad or Kucker, and that the problem is that distribution is different under the Trust and the Will. Mr. Coffino-Greenberg argued that it was a general assignment, that Aidan and Nuala's children are the same, that the Children agree that the assets were community property, that they did not file a petition for spousal property because there is a Trust and that the assets are listed on schedule A of the Trust except for #1 and #3 (the cash accounts). The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to May 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a supplemental declaration to demonstrate that assets 1 through 23 (with the exception of #1 and #3/the cash accounts) are in fact assets that are listed on schedule A of the Trust. Said declaration is to be filed by April 29, 2014. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to May 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
